project.versionNotes: package-solution.json uses 4-part format X.Y.Z.0; see scripts/release.ps1 for bump logic

statusRecommendations.priorityNote: Array is ordered by priority: fix broken state first, then sync, then ship, then handoff.

rules.handback: Suggest when local branch SHA does not match origin or default branch is behind remote.
rules.handoff: Suggest when working tree has local changes or current branch is ahead of origin and user is moving machines.
rules.ship: Suggest when there are unshipped commits since last tag or version/tag drift exists.
rules.abort: Suggest when a partial workflow state is detected (e.g. merge in progress, bump/tag mismatch, failed prior workflow).
rules.none: Suggest when branch is clean, synced, and no SHIP is needed.

docsInfraPolicy.comment: For docs/infra-only changes: skip npm test (Heft/Jest), keep editor diagnostics (e.g. markdown lint, ESLint)

build.comment: Default to dev builds (npm run build uses Heft). Production builds bundle and package .sppkg.

tagging.comment: Tags are created only during SHIP when a version bump occurs.

codeLossPrevention.comment: Added after 83f8404 silently deleted 71 files (13,313 lines). These gates ensure destructive merges are caught before they reach the remote.
